stories.headline: Iran-strike fears hammer crypto: BTC bottoms at $75.7K, ETH at $2.25K week lows
stories.tldr: Reports of Trump weighing new Iran action sent BTC to its lowest open in a week as Brent crude spiked 7%.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Risk-off flows are gutting the April rally narrative just as seasonality was set to underwrite a May bid.
the_details: BTC opened $75,752 — lowest since April 22 — before bouncing to $76,130 by 7:18 a.m. ET.
ETH opened $2,252, lowest since April 13, rebounding to $2,268 alongside BTC's recovery.
Fear & Greed Index sits at 33 (Fear); Brent crude jumped 7.1% to $126 on Strait of Hormuz chatter.

stories.headline: Bitcoin spot ETFs bleed third straight day at $138M; ether funds shed $88M
stories.tldr: Spot BTC ETFs lost $137.77M on April 29, a third consecutive outflow day, led by IBIT and FBTC; ETH ETFs dropped $87.73M.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Three days of outflows undercuts the April-absorbed-$1.7B framing — institutions are de-risking ahead of May macro prints.
the_details: BlackRock IBIT led with -$54.73M; Fidelity FBTC -$36.13M on April 29.
Ether spot ETFs lost $87.73M in the same session.
Macro overhang: 30-year US Treasury yield hit 5% as bond rout deepens alongside oil shock.

stories.headline: Western Union picks Solana for May launch of USDPT cross-border stablecoin
stories.tldr: Western Union confirmed USDPT, a Solana-based stablecoin, will launch in May 2026 as an internal cross-border settlement rail.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A 170-year remittance giant routing flows over Solana validates the chain as a real-world payments venue against Tron and Ethereum.
the_details: USDPT launches May 2026 on Solana as WU's internal settlement layer.
Targets cross-border corridors currently dominated by Tether USDT on Tron.
Lands days after MoneyGram and Stripe expanded their own stablecoin payout rails.

stories.headline: Solana's Alpenglow upgrade targets 80x finality boost: 12s to 150ms in 2026
stories.tldr: Solana's pending Alpenglow consensus upgrade aims to cut block finality from roughly 12 seconds to about 150 milliseconds — an 80x speed-up.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Sub-second finality reframes Solana as a credible settlement layer for HFT, payments, and CEX-grade UX before any L2 catches up.
the_details: Finality drops from ~12,000ms to ~150ms — roughly 80x faster.
Replaces TowerBFT with new Votor and Rotor consensus components.
Rollout scheduled across 2026 with testnet activation already underway.

stories.headline: AllUnity ports MiCA-compliant EURAU euro stablecoin to Solana
stories.tldr: Germany's AllUnity expanded its MiCA-compliant EURAU euro stablecoin to Solana as the euro-pegged market doubled since early 2025.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Euro liquidity on Solana stacked with WU's USDPT positions the chain as a multi-fiat onchain payments hub, not just a memecoin venue.
the_details: EURAU now lives on Solana alongside its existing Ethereum deployment.
Euro stablecoin market cap has doubled since January 2025 on MiCA tailwinds.
AllUnity is backed by DWS, Flow Traders, and Galaxy under German BaFin oversight.
